---
title: "Oliver Hannaoui"
---

Greetings, I am a first-year Statistics PhD student at [Carnegie Mellon University](https://www.cmu.edu/dietrich/statistics-datascience/index.html).

Previously, I spent a year in Paris and completed an [M1 Applied Mathematics and Statistics program](https://www.ip-paris.fr/en/education/masters/applied-mathematics-and-statistics-program/master-year-1-applied-mathematics-and-statistics) at the Polytechnic Institute of Paris. During my time in Paris, I also completed an AI engineering internship at [Ennov](https://en.ennov.com).

Prior to that, I spent two formative years in New York City as a Senior Research Analyst in the Financial Intermediation group at the [Federal Reserve Bank of New York](https://www.newyorkfed.org/research) after graduating with bachelor's degrees in [Economics](https://economics.ucdavis.edu) and [Statistics](https://statistics.ucdavis.edu) from the University of California, Davis.
